ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARIA C. HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-1995 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PONER, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARIA C. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,029.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
